    M

    markAllAsRead(Long) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.NotificationResource
    Marks all notifications for a user as read (FR-12).
    markAsRead(Long) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.NotificationResource
    Marks a single notification as read (FR-12).
    MEMBER - Enum-Konstante in Enum-Klasse at.jku.se.entity.enums.UserRole
    Standard account with limited control capabilities.
    message - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.ConflictResponse
    Human-readable description of the conflict in German.
    message - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.NotificationResponse
    Notification message text.
    message - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Notification
    The notification message text.
    MockProtocolAdapter - Klasse in at.jku.se.iot
    Mock IoT protocol adapter for development and testing.
    MockProtocolAdapter() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.iot.MockProtocolAdapter
    Creates a disconnected mock adapter instance.
    MqttProtocolAdapter - Klasse in at.jku.se.iot
    MQTT protocol adapter for communicating with physical IoT devices.
    MqttProtocolAdapter(String) - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.iot.MqttProtocolAdapter
    Creates an MQTT adapter configured for the given broker.
